backward_compatibility.rationale: New additive feature, no existing GUI to be backward-compatible with

legacy_code_removal.rationale: gui_deprecated left as-is per user decision Q6; user will clean up separately

option_selection.rationale: OPT-1R: GhostBan Board + BesoGo Tree + No Build Step. Revised from OPT-1 to eliminate accidental complexity (custom SVG tree, Vite+npm). Bridge.py serves GUI via StaticFiles. Zero npm dependencies.
